requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence - Bhutan PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——不丹光伏逆变器项目
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——不丹光伏逆變器項目

summary.en: For Bhutan solar PV inverter projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. BSB standards adoption, BEA/BPC technical review, EPC procurement, lender due diligence, or project-owner specifications may require IEC 62109 type-test certificates for the exact inverter model or model family. Because Bhutan includes high-altitude Himalayan sites, safety evidence should also be checked for altitude-related insulation coordination, thermal performance, enclosure protection, and derating assumptions.
summary.zh: 对于不丹太阳能光伏逆变器项目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系统用功率转换器的核心国际安全标准。BSB标准采纳、BEA/BPC技术审查、EPC采购、贷款方尽调或项目业主规格可能要求具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109型式试验证书。由于不丹包含喜马拉雅高海拔场址，安全证据还应核查与海拔相关的绝缘配合、热性能、外壳防护和降额假设。
summary.zht: 對於不丹太陽能光伏逆變器項目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系統用功率轉換器的核心國際安全標準。BSB標準採納、BEA/BPC技術審查、EPC採購、貸款方盡調或項目業主規格可能要求具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109型式試驗證書。由於不丹包含喜馬拉雅高海拔場址，安全證據還應核查與海拔相關的絕緣配合、熱性能、外殼防護和降額假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Bhutan Standards Bureau - national standards adoption and conformity-assessment context
Bhutan Electricity Authority and Bhutan Power Corporation - project-level technical review context

summary.en: China-side inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS laboratory reports. These can help explain product design and domestic compliance, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Bhutan. A Chinese report should be checked for the exact model, component substitutions, firmware, enclosure rating, altitude limits, and whether the tested configuration matches the unit supplied to Bhutan.
summary.zh: 中国侧逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证，以及CNAS实验室报告。这些资料可用于说明产品设计和国内合规，但不会自动等同于不丹项目所需的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。应核查中国报告是否覆盖具体型号、部件替换、固件、外壳等级、海拔限制，以及测试配置是否与供应至不丹的设备一致。
summary.zht: 中國側逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證，以及CNAS實驗室報告。這些資料可用於說明產品設計和國內合規，但不會自動等同於不丹項目所需的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。應核查中國報告是否覆蓋具體型號、部件替換、韌體、外殼等級、海拔限制，以及測試配置是否與供應至不丹的設備一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic GB/T or NB/T certificate is not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence where Bhutan project documents call for IEC standards. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or reports from an accredited laboratory for the model family supplied, confirm report validity after any bill-of-materials or firmware changes, and document altitude derating for Bhutan sites. Manuals and labels should state installation limits, protective earthing, overvoltage category, enclosure rating, and ambient/altitude derating in terms acceptable to the project reviewer.
gap.zh: 差距：当不丹项目文件要求IEC标准时，中国国内GB/T或NB/T证书不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据。出口商应为所供应型号系列取得认可实验室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2证书或报告，在物料清单或固件变更后确认报告有效性，并记录不丹场址海拔降额。手册和标签应以项目审查方可接受的方式说明安装限制、保护接地、过电压类别、外壳等级，以及环境温度和海拔降额。
gap.zht: 差距：當不丹項目文件要求IEC標準時，中國國內GB/T或NB/T證書不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據。出口商應為所供應型號系列取得認可實驗室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2證書或報告，在物料清單或韌體變更後確認報告有效性，並記錄不丹場址海拔降額。手冊和標籤應以項目審查方可接受的方式說明安裝限制、保護接地、過電壓類別、外殼等級，以及環境溫度和海拔降額。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory in practice where BSB-adopted standards, BEA/BPC review, lender requirements, owner specifications, or EPC procurement documents require IEC 62109 evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China for many inverter certification schemes; not automatically accepted as Bhutan IEC 62109 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence satisfies Bhutan IEC 62109 expectations. Obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the supplied inverter model or family, check report coverage after design changes, and document high-altitude derating before BEA, BPC, owner, or EPC review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全证据满足不丹IEC 62109预期。请为所供应逆变器型号或系列取得IEC 62109-1/-2证据，在设计变更后核查报告覆盖范围，并在BEA、BPC、业主或EPC审查前记录高海拔降额。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全證據滿足不丹IEC 62109預期。請為所供應逆變器型號或系列取得IEC 62109-1/-2證據，在設計變更後核查報告覆蓋範圍，並在BEA、BPC、業主或EPC審查前記錄高海拔降額。
